Bash(cd ~/stock_screener && source venv/bin/activate && python - <<'EOF'
import yfinance as yf
import pandas as pd

ticker = "157A.T"
stock = yf.Ticker\(ticker\)
df = stock.history\(period="2mo", auto_adjust=True\)

BREAKOUT_DAYS = 20
n = BREAKOUT_DAYS + 1

close       = float\(df["Close"].iloc[-1]\)
past_high_20 = float\(df["High"].iloc[-n:-1].max\(\)\)
close_3ago  = float\(df["Close"].iloc[-3]\)

print\(f"=== {ticker} ブレイクアウト判定デバッグ ==="\)
print\(f"直近終値     \(iloc[-1]\): {close:,.0f}円  \({df.index[-1].date\(\)}\)"\)
print\(f"前日終値     \(iloc[-2]\): {float\(df['Close'].iloc[-2]\):,.0f}円  \({df.index[-2].date\(\)}\)"\)
print\(f"3日前終値    \(iloc[-3]\): {close_3ago:,.0f}円  \({df.index[-3].date\(\)}\)"\)
print\(f"4日前終値    \(iloc[-4]\): {float\(df['Close'].iloc[-4]\):,.0f}円  \({df.index[-4].date\(\)}\)"\)
print\(f"20日高値\(参照\): {past_high_20:,.0f}円  \(過去{BREAKOUT_DAYS}日: {df.index[-n].date\(\)} 〜 {df.index[-2].date\(\)}\)"\)
print\(\)
print\(f"close > past_high_20      : {close} > {past_high_20} → {close > past_high_20}"\)
print\(f"iloc[-2] > past_high_20   : {float\(df['Close'].iloc[-2]\)} > {past_high_20} → {float\(df['Close'].iloc[-2]\) > past_high_20}"\)
print\(f"iloc[-3] > past_high_20   : {close_3ago} > {past_high_20} → {close_3ago > past_high_20}"\)
print\(f"iloc[-4] > past_high_20   : {float\(df['Close'].iloc[-4]\)} > {past_high_20} → {float\(df['Close'].iloc[-4]\) > past_high_20}"\)
print\(\)
print\(f"recent_breakout判定 \(iloc[-3] <= past_high_20\): {close_3ago} <= {past_high_20} → {close_3ago <= past_high_20}"\)
print\(\)

# 実際にいつ20日高値をブレイクしたか
print\("=== 直近10日の終値と20日高値との比較 ==="\)
for i in range\(-10, 0\):
    ph = float\(df["High"].iloc[i-n:i].max\(\)\) if abs\(i\) + n <= len\(df\) else None
    c  = float\(df["Close"].iloc[i]\)
    dt = df.index[i].date\(\)
    above = f"★ブレイク" if ph and c > ph else ""
    ph_str = f"{ph:,.0f}" if ph else "N/A"
    print\(f"  {dt}  終値:{c:>8,.0f}  その日の20日高値:{ph_str:>8}  {above}"\)
EOF)

Bash(sleep 15 && cd ~/stock_screener && source venv/bin/activate && python - <<'EOF'
import yfinance as yf
import pandas as pd

ticker = "157A.T"
df = yf.Ticker\(ticker\).history\(period="2mo", auto_adjust=True\)

BREAKOUT_DAYS = 20
n = BREAKOUT_DAYS + 1

close        = float\(df["Close"].iloc[-1]\)
past_high_20 = float\(df["High"].iloc[-n:-1].max\(\)\)
close_3ago   = float\(df["Close"].iloc[-3]\)

print\(f"=== {ticker} ブレイクアウト判定デバッグ ==="\)
print\(f"直近終値  \(iloc[-1]\): {close:>8,.0f}円  \({df.index[-1].date\(\)}\)"\)
print\(f"前日終値  \(iloc[-2]\): {float\(df['Close'].iloc[-2]\):>8,.0f}円  \({df.index[-2].date\(\)}\)"\)
print\(f"3日前終値 \(iloc[-3]\): {close_3ago:>8,.0f}円  \({df.index[-3].date\(\)}\)"\)
print\(f"4日前終値 \(iloc[-4]\): {float\(df['Close'].iloc[-4]\):>8,.0f}円  \({df.index[-4].date\(\)}\)"\)
print\(f"20日高値  \(参照範囲\): {past_high_20:>8,.0f}円  \({df.index[-n].date\(\)} 〜 {df.index[-2].date\(\)}\)"\)
print\(\)
print\("=== recent_breakout 判定 ==="\)
print\(f"条件: iloc[-3]終値 <= 20日高値"\)
print\(f"      {close_3ago:,.0f} <= {past_high_20:,.0f}  →  {close_3ago <= past_high_20}"\)
print\(\)
print\("=== 直近10日の終値と「その日の20日高値」比較 ==="\)
for i in range\(-10, 0\):
    idx_high_end = i      # その日を除く
    idx_high_start = i - n
    if len\(df\) + idx_high_start < 0:
        continue
    ph = float\(df["High"].iloc[idx_high_start:idx_high_end].max\(\)\)
    c  = float\(df["Close"].iloc[i]\)
    dt = df.index[i].date\(\)
    mark = "★ブレイク" if c > ph else ""
    print\(f"  {dt}  終値:{c:>8,.0f}  その日の20日高値:{ph:>8,.0f}  {mark}"\)
EOF)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 - << 'EOF'
import json, sys
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import yfinance as yf
import pandas as pd

RESULTS_DIR = Path\("results"\)
files = sorted\(RESULTS_DIR.glob\("*.json"\)\)

# 各日の結果を読み込み
days = []
for f in files:
    d = json.loads\(f.read_text\(\)\)
    days.append\(d\)

print\(f"結果ファイル数: {len\(days\)} 日分"\)
print\(f"日付: {[d['date'] for d in days]}"\)

# 各日・各戦略の銘柄一覧を表示
for d in days:
    for sk, entries in d['strategies'].items\(\):
        for e in entries:
            print\(f"{d['date']} | {sk} | {e['code']} | close={e['close']}"\)
EOF)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 - << 'EOF'
# 08:07時点でベースラインに入っていた銘柄を再チェック
import yfinance as yf
import pandas as pd
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings\("ignore"\)

# 08:07の結果（3件だった）を確認 → 16:32結果JSONは上書きされているので
# ログから確認。スクリーナーコードの条件を手動チェック

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
from stock_screener import \(
    fetch_history, calc_rsi, calc_macd, get_weekly_ma25,
    has_weekly_uptrend, get_market_cap,
    MAX_MARKET_CAP_YEN, BREAKOUT_DAYS, VOL_MULT, MIN_AVG_VOLUME, MIN_AVG_TURNOVER
\)

# 今日のbaseline候補だった銘柄（3/11 08:07のログから）
# ログには157A, 3444 が baseline で出ていた
candidates = ["157A.T", "3444.T", "3267.T", "3927.T"]

for ticker in candidates:
    stock = yf.Ticker\(ticker\)
    mc = stock.fast_info.market_cap
    df = fetch_history\(ticker, days=400\)
    if df is None or len\(df\) < 25:
        print\(f"{ticker}: データ不足"\)
        continue

    close = float\(df["Close"].iloc[-1]\)
    df["MA25"] = df["Close"].rolling\(25\).mean\(\)
    ma25_daily = float\(df["MA25"].iloc[-1]\)
    ma25_weekly = get_weekly_ma25\(df\)

    n = BREAKOUT_DAYS + 1
    avg_vol_20 = float\(df["Volume"].iloc[-n:-1].mean\(\)\)
    vol_now = float\(df["Volume"].iloc[-1]\)

    rsi = float\(calc_rsi\(df["Close"]\).iloc[-1]\)
    macd_s, sig_s = calc_macd\(df["Close"]\)
    macd_now = float\(macd_s.iloc[-1]\)
    sig_now = float\(sig_s.iloc[-1]\)

    above_daily = close > ma25_daily
    above_weekly = ma25_weekly is not None and close > ma25_weekly
    weekly_uptrend = has_weekly_uptrend\(df\)
    vol_2x = avg_vol_20 > 0 and vol_now >= avg_vol_20 * VOL_MULT

    passed = above_daily and above_weekly and weekly_uptrend and vol_2x and 50.0 <= rsi <= 70.0 and macd_now > sig_now

    print\(f"\\n{ticker}  終値={close:.0f}  {'✓PASS' if passed else '✗NG'}"\)
    print\(f"  日足MA25上:{above_daily}\({close:.0f}>{ma25_daily:.0f}\)"\)
    print\(f"  週足MA25上:{above_weekly}\({close:.0f}>{ma25_weekly:.0f if ma25_weekly else 'N/A'}\)"\)
    print\(f"  週足ダウ  :{weekly_uptrend}"\)
    print\(f"  出来高2倍 :{vol_2x}\({vol_now:.0f}/{avg_vol_20:.0f}={vol_now/avg_vol_20:.2f}x\)"\)
    print\(f"  RSI 50-70 :{50<=rsi<=70} \(RSI={rsi:.1f}\)"\)
    print\(f"  MACD陽転  :{macd_now>sig_now}\({macd_now:.2f}>{sig_now:.2f}\)"\)
EOF)

Bash(sleep 15 && source venv/bin/activate && python3 - << 'EOF'
import yfinance as yf
import pandas as pd
import warnings, sys
warnings.filterwarnings\("ignore"\)
sys.path.insert\(0, "."\)
from stock_screener import \(
    fetch_history, calc_rsi, calc_macd, get_weekly_ma25,
    has_weekly_uptrend, BREAKOUT_DAYS, VOL_MULT
\)

# 3/11 08:07時点でbaselineに入っていた銘柄
candidates = ["157A.T", "3444.T"]

for ticker in candidates:
    df = fetch_history\(ticker, days=400\)
    if df is None or len\(df\) < 25:
        print\(f"{ticker}: データ不足"\); continue

    close = float\(df["Close"].iloc[-1]\)
    df["MA25"] = df["Close"].rolling\(25\).mean\(\)
    ma25_daily  = float\(df["MA25"].iloc[-1]\)
    ma25_weekly = get_weekly_ma25\(df\)
    n = BREAKOUT_DAYS + 1
    avg_vol_20  = float\(df["Volume"].iloc[-n:-1].mean\(\)\)
    vol_now     = float\(df["Volume"].iloc[-1]\)
    rsi         = float\(calc_rsi\(df["Close"]\).iloc[-1]\)
    macd_s, sig_s = calc_macd\(df["Close"]\)
    macd_now, sig_now = float\(macd_s.iloc[-1]\), float\(sig_s.iloc[-1]\)

    above_daily    = close > ma25_daily
    above_weekly   = ma25_weekly is not None and close > ma25_weekly
    weekly_uptrend = has_weekly_uptrend\(df\)
    vol_2x         = avg_vol_20 > 0 and vol_now >= avg_vol_20 * VOL_MULT

    print\(f"\\n{ticker}  終値={close:.0f}"\)
    print\(f"  日足MA25上  : {'OK' if above_daily else 'NG'}  \({close:.0f} > {ma25_daily:.0f}\)"\)
    print\(f"  週足MA25上  : {'OK' if above_weekly else 'NG'}  \({close:.0f} > {ma25_weekly:.0f if ma25_weekly else 'N/A'}\)"\)
    print\(f"  週足ダウ    : {'OK' if weekly_uptrend else 'NG'}"\)
    print\(f"  出来高2倍   : {'OK' if vol_2x else 'NG'}  \({vol_now:.0f} / avg={avg_vol_20:.0f} = {vol_now/avg_vol_20:.2f}x\)"\)
    print\(f"  RSI 50-70   : {'OK' if 50<=rsi<=70 else 'NG'}  \(RSI={rsi:.1f}\)"\)
    print\(f"  MACD陽転    : {'OK' if macd_now>sig_now else 'NG'}  \({macd_now:.2f} > {sig_now:.2f}\)"\)
EOF)

# バックテストデータで新条件のシグナル頻度を推計
import json
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

signals = json.loads\(Path\("backtest_results.json"\).read_text\(\)\)
df = pd.DataFrame\(signals\)

# 旧バックテスト（条件変更前）の1日あたり平均シグナル数
df["date"] = pd.to_datetime\(df["date"]\)
daily = df.groupby\(["date","strategy"]\).size\(\).reset_index\(name="count"\)

for sk, label in [\("baseline","ベースライン型"\), \("breakout","ブレイクアウト型"\), \("pullback","押し目買い型"\)]:
    d = daily[daily["strategy"]==sk]["count"]
    print\(f"{label}: 平均{d.mean\(\):.1f}件/日 中央値{d.median\(\):.1f}件 最大{d.max\(\)}件 0件の日{\(d==0\).sum\(\)}日/{len\(d\)}日"\)
EOF)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw

def draw_candle\(draw, x, body_top, body_bottom, wick_top, wick_bottom, color, width=28\):
    # Wick
    draw.line\([\(x, wick_top\), \(x, wick_bottom\)], fill=color, width=4\)
    # Body
    draw.rounded_rectangle\(
        [x - width//2, body_top, x + width//2, body_bottom],
        radius=4, fill=color
    \)

def make_icon\(size\):
    img = Image.new\('RGBA', \(size, size\), '#1a2b4a'\)
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(img\)

    s = size / 512  # scale factor

    # Draw subtle grid lines
    grid_color = \(255, 255, 255, 20\)
    for y_pct in [0.25, 0.5, 0.75]:
        y = int\(size * y_pct\)
        draw.line\([\(int\(40*s\), y\), \(int\(472*s\), y\)], fill=grid_color, width=max\(1, int\(1*s\)\)\)

    # Candle data: \(x_center, body_top, body_bottom, wick_top, wick_bottom, color\)
    # Designed to look like a bullish chart
    candles = [
        # x,  body_top, body_bot, wick_top, wick_bot, color
        \(90,   320,      390,      290,      420,      '#e74c3c'\),
        \(160,  280,      360,      260,      385,      '#e74c3c'\),
        \(230,  240,      310,      220,      335,      '#2ecc71'\),
        \(300,  200,      270,      180,      295,      '#2ecc71'\),
        \(370,  155,      225,      135,      250,      '#2ecc71'\),
        \(440,  120,      190,      100,      215,      '#2ecc71'\),
    ]

    w = int\(28 * s\)
    for \(cx, bt, bb, wt, wb, col\) in candles:
        draw_candle\(draw,
            int\(cx * s\),
            int\(bt * s\), int\(bb * s\),
            int\(wt * s\), int\(wb * s\),
            col, width=w\)

    # Subtle upward trend line
    line_color = \(255, 255, 255, 60\)
    pts = [\(int\(90*s\), int\(355*s\)\), \(int\(440*s\), int\(155*s\)\)]
    draw.line\(pts, fill=line_color, width=max\(1, int\(2*s\)\)\)

    # Rounded corners mask for app icon feel
    mask = Image.new\('L', \(size, size\), 0\)
    mask_draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(mask\)
    radius = int\(size * 0.18\)
    mask_draw.rounded_rectangle\([0, 0, size-1, size-1], radius=radius, fill=255\)
    img.putalpha\(mask\)

    return img

# 512x512 favicon
icon_512 = make_icon\(512\)
icon_512.save\('/Users/tanakarano/stock_screener/app/public/favicon.png'\)
print\("favicon.png saved"\)

# 180x180 apple-touch-icon \(standard size\)
icon_180 = make_icon\(180\)
icon_180.save\('/Users/tanakarano/stock_screener/app/public/apple-touch-icon.png'\)
print\("apple-touch-icon.png saved"\)
EOF)

import json
from pathlib import Path

results_dir = Path\('/Users/tanakarano/stock_screener/results'\)
for path in results_dir.glob\('*.json'\):
    text = path.read_text\(encoding='utf-8'\)
    if '↑' in text or '↓' in text:
        text = text.replace\('↑', 'up'\).replace\('↓', 'down'\)
        path.write_text\(text, encoding='utf-8'\)
        print\(f'Fixed: {path.name}'\)
")
